title: Sidebar
description: A sidebar component for building navigation layouts with header, content, menu items, groups, and footer.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the sidebar component code.

examples.title: With Icons
examples.description: Sidebar menu items with Lucide icons for improved visual hierarchy.
examples.code:
import { Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarFooter, SidebarGroup, SidebarGroupContent, SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarHeader, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuItem, } from "@shery-ui/components"; import { LayoutDashboard, Puzzle, Settings, Bell, HelpCircle } from "lucide-react"; const items = [ { label: "Dashboard", icon: LayoutDashboard, isActive: true }, { label: "Components", icon: Puzzle }, { label: "Notifications", icon: Bell }, { label: "Settings", icon: Settings }, { label: "Help", icon: HelpCircle }, ]; export default function SidebarWithIcons() { return (

Dashboard

Navigation menu

 Main {items.map(({ label, icon: Icon, isActive }) => ( {label} ))}

v1.0.0
); }
